title: keckia ternata
intro: Keckia ternata, also known as Mountain Mint or Horsemint, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its square stem and white, pink, or purple flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Keckia ternata include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs and colds, and providing relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and indigestion. Keckia ternata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical salves, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
